Klasse Material

java.lang.Object
raytracer.Material
Bekannte direkte Unterklassen:
CheckeredMaterial, RefractiveMaterial
public class Material extends Object
Represents a basic material with diffuse and specular properties.

  • Felddetails

    • kDiffuse

      protected final Color kDiffuse

    • kSpecular

      public final double kSpecular

    • shininess

      public final double shininess

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Material

      public Material(Color kDiffuse, double kSpecular, double shininess)
      Creates a new light at a given position.
      Parameter:
      kDiffuse - the diffuse color of the material.
      kSpecular - the intensity of the specular lighting.
      shininess - the highlight rolloff of the specular lighting.

  • Methodendetails

    • getDiffuseColor

      public Color getDiffuseColor(double u, double v)
      Base implementation for an uv coloring system. Can be overriden by extended classes to color the object based on the uv coordinates.
      Parameter:
      u - the u coordinate of the object.
      v - the v coordinate of the object.
      Gibt zurück:
      the color diffuse color.
